message:
feat(messaging): add bounded speculative publish execution for low-conflict fabric cells

Introduces a speculative execution subsystem for the messaging fabric that
allows low-conflict cells to optimistically publish without the full cell
lock, falling back to standard publish on conflict detection.

New types: CellConflictHistogram, SpeculativeExecutionPolicy (with kill
switches, temperature/conflict-rate thresholds, service-class gates),
SpeculativePublishRequest, SpeculativePublishAttempt (RAII commit/abort),
SpeculativePublishOutcome, SpeculativeExecutionError (7 variants).

Also adds cell_temperature_rank() helper for stable CellTemperature ordering.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
